platforms.name: ChatGPT Enterprise (OpenAI)

**Community concerns**: Codex agent data loss (file deletion outside project dirs), gpt-5.4-mini Batch API incompatibility

platforms.name: Google Vertex AI

platforms.name: ServiceNow
details: Both release notes and documentation pages require JavaScript rendering
Static fetch returns only loader scripts and analytics code
Manual review recommended

platforms.name: Cursor
details: **Mar 11**: 30+ marketplace plugins (Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Hugging Face) with MCP cloud agent support
**Mar 5**: Automations — always-on agents triggered by Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, webhooks
**Mar 4**: JetBrains IDE support via Agent Client Protocol (ACP)
**Mar 3 (v2.6)**: MCP Apps and Team Marketplaces with private plugin governance for Teams/Enterprise
**Feb 26**: Bugbot Autofix — cloud agents auto-fix PRs (35% merge rate)
Security relevance: Team Marketplace governance controls; enterprise identity/compliance features; MCP protocol expansion

platforms.name: Windsurf

**Mar 9 (v1.9577.24)**: SKILL.md file loading, MCP context improvements, Jupyter Notebook fixes

platforms.name: Perplexity

Single endpoint: POST /v1/agent with Bearer token auth
Supports model fallback chains, presets (fast-search, pro-search, deep-research)

platforms.name: Dia Browser
details: Latest: v1.22.0 (Mar 11) — Proactive Suggestions, performance improvements, profile switching
Security: Prompt injection defense layers, Chromium-based with aggressive patching
Bug bounty via HackerOne; disabled GAIA, UMA, profile sync

aidr.title: OpenAI Codex data loss vulnerability

aidr.description: computer_use_preview graduating to production — requires Activity monitoring expansion for screen-interaction agents

aidr.title: Cursor Automations
aidr.description: Always-on agents triggered by external events (Slack, GitHub, PagerDuty) — new agent Activity patterns to monitor

aidr.title: Windsurf SKILL.md
aidr.description: System-level skill injection via MDM — potential vector for enterprise-wide agent behavior modification, needs Data Lens coverage

aidr.title: OpenAI status incidents
aidr.description: Multiple service disruptions Mar 17-18 — Activity monitoring should track availability patterns

aispm.title: Cursor Team Marketplaces

aispm.title: Vertex AI Explainable AI deprecation
aispm.description: Affects model governance posture — AISPM Violations may need updated policies for explainability requirements

aispm.title: Vertex AI Vector Search 2.0

aispm.title: Bedrock AgentCore Policy governance

endpoint.title: Windsurf GPT-5.4 Mini

endpoint.title: Dia Browser v1.22.0 Proactive Suggestions
endpoint.description: AI-driven suggestions now proactively offered to users — new browser endpoint behavior to monitor

highlights: **OpenAI SDK updates**: Python v2.29.0 and Node v6.32.0 add GPT-5.4 nano/mini model support and /v1/videos batch endpoint

**OpenAI stability concerns**: Multiple incidents on Mar 17-18 (ChatGPT 5.4 Pro errors, Sora failures, auth issues) -- all resolved; community reports Codex data loss vulnerability (agent file deletion outside project directories)
**Google Vertex AI**: Vertex Explainable AI deprecated (Mar 16); Vector Search 2.0 GA (Mar 5); partner model evaluations expanded
**Cursor rapid iteration**: 30+ marketplace plugins, Automations (always-on agents), JetBrains IDE support, Team Marketplaces with governance controls
**Windsurf**: GPT-5.4 Mini now available; Apple M5 hardware support
**Microsoft Copilot Studio**: Work IQ Preview for real-time M365 insights; Claude Sonnet 4.5 for Computer Use agents
**Anthropic**: $100M Claude Partner Network; Anthropic Institute launch; Mozilla Firefox security partnership
**Dia Browser**: v1.22.0 with AI-driven Proactive Suggestions

platforms.name: Microsoft Copilot (M365)
details: M365 Admin Center latest updates through November 2025, with Copilot Search Admin experience (June 2025) and AI Administrator role (January 2025) as notable recent additions
Graph API Changelog shows active development in identity governance, lifecycle workflows, and audit capabilities as of February 2026
Copilot extensibility documentation covers declarative agents, custom engine agents, plugins, connectors, and the new Microsoft Agent 365 (early access preview)
https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/whats-new-in-preview?view=o365-worldwide
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/extensibility/

platforms.name: Microsoft Copilot Studio
details: Extremely active development cadence with monthly feature releases
March 2026: Work IQ tools (Preview) for real-time work insights from M365
February 2026: Claude model integration (Sonnet 4.5 for Computer Use, Opus 4.6 for prompts), content moderation sensitivity controls
January 2026: Agent evaluations enhancements, Computer Use expansions with Cloud PC pooling, VS Code extension GA
November 2025: GPT-5 Chat GA, multi-agent orchestration, MCP server support, SharePoint metadata filters
Released versions page only shows August-September 2024 entries (may be incomplete)

platforms.name: Azure AI Foundry
details: Platform rebranded from "Azure AI Studio" to "Microsoft Foundry"
February 2026: GPT-Realtime-1.5 and GPT-Audio-1.5 models released
December 2025: GPT-image-1.5, improved transcription/TTS/realtime-mini models
October 2025: GPT-4o-transcribe-diarize, PII detection filter, Realtime API SIP support
August-September 2025: GPT-5 family (GPT-5, GPT-5-mini, GPT-5-nano, GPT-5-chat, GPT-5-codex), Sora video generation (text-to-video, image-to-video, video-to-video)
API Reference: GA version 2024-10-21, Control Plane 2025-06-01, with monthly previews

platforms.name: Salesforce AgentForce
details: Spring '26 release is live, themed around "Agentic Enterprise" — combining human expertise with AI productivity
AgentForce positioned as "the agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform" with Trust Layer architecture
Developer tools include: Agent API, Python SDK, Models API, Testing API, Mobile SDK (iOS/Android)
Agent Script provides hybrid natural language + programmatic expression authoring
Agentforce DX supports pro-code workflows via CLI and VS Code
Spring '26 spans Agentforce, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Field Service, Marketing Cloud, Commerce, and Analytics

platforms.name: ChatGPT Enterprise (OpenAI)

platform.openai.com/docs/changelog — 403
openai.com/index/ — 403
help.openai.com/en/articles/6825453-chatgpt-release-notes — 403
**Action needed:** Consider alternative data sources such as RSS feeds, OpenAI's API status page, or manual browser-based checks
https://platform.openai.com/docs/changelog

platforms.name: Claude Enterprise (Anthropic)
details: Documentation has migrated from docs.anthropic.com to platform.claude.com (301 redirects)
Latest models: Claude Opus 4.6 (Feb 5, 2026) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Feb 17, 2026)
API surface organized into: Model capabilities, Tools (server-side & client-side), Tool infrastructure, Context management, Files/assets
Key capabilities: 1M token context, adaptive thinking, batch processing (50% savings), citations, computer use, MCP connector, agent skills
Beta features: Files API, Skills API
Available on direct API, Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, Azure AI

highlights: First run — baselines established for all monitored platforms
**All 3 OpenAI URLs returned HTTP 403** — these sources block automated fetching and need alternative access methods (browser scraping, RSS feeds, or API-based approaches)
**Anthropic docs URLs have migrated** from `docs.anthropic.com` to `platform.claude.com` — config should be updated
Microsoft ecosystem is very active: GPT-Realtime-1.5/GPT-Audio-1.5 just released in Feb 2026, Copilot Studio added Work IQ tools in Mar 2026
Salesforce Spring '26 release is now live with "Agentic Enterprise" as the primary theme
Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.6 (Feb 5) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Feb 17), raised $30B Series G at $380B valuation
Copilot Studio now supports Claude models (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.5) for prompt building and Computer Use agents
